disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A few days of feeling generally unwell with a mild fever, then a sudden onset of tingling/burning of the lips that rapidly became widespread blisters and then raw, painful sores across the lips and throughout the mouth (gums, cheeks, tongue).
trigger_question_examples: Can you walk me through how this started and how it spread?
What did the sores look like when they first came up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was run-down with a mild fever for a few days, then got a horrible tingling on my lips that turned into blisters and then raw sores all over my lips, gums, cheeks and tongue.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to swallow fluids because of severe mouth/throat pain (odynophagia), with no oral intake for around 18 hours and drooling of saliva to avoid painful swallowing.
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to drink at all? When did you last manage any fluids?
Is it too painful to swallow even your saliva?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't swallow anything — I haven't had a drink since last night because it hurts too much, and I've been spitting my saliva into a tissue instead of swallowing it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms of early dehydration — markedly reduced urine output, a very dry mouth, generalised weakness and lightheadedness on sitting up.
trigger_question_examples: How much urine have you passed today, and what colour is it?
Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded when you sit or stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've hardly passed any urine, my mouth is really dry, and I feel weak and a bit lightheaded whenever I sit up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: This is the first time this has ever happened — no previous episodes of mouth sores or cold-sore-type blisters — occurring after a systemic prodrome of malaise and fever (fits a first, severe primary infection rather than a mild recurrence).
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever had anything like this before?
Do you get recurrent mouth or lip sores normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I've never had anything like this before — this is the first time, and it came after days of feeling generally sick and feverish.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new medications, tablets, creams or antibiotics started in the preceding weeks; no rash, blisters or peeling on the skin elsewhere on the body; and no sores or redness in the eyes or genitals — arguing against a severe cutaneous adverse drug reaction (Stevens-Johnson syndrome / erythema multiforme major).
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medicine, tablet or antibiotic in the last few weeks?
Any rash, blisters or peeling on your skin, or any soreness in your eyes or genitals?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No new medicines or antibiotics at all, no rash or peeling anywhere else on my skin, and nothing wrong with my eyes or down below — it's just my mouth and lips.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No difficulty breathing, no noisy or whistling breathing, no muffled or 'hot potato' voice, no difficulty opening the mouth, and no external neck swelling — no features suggesting a deep-space throat infection or airway compromise.
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing, or is your breathing noisy?
Does your voice sound muffled, or is there any swelling in your neck or trouble opening your mouth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing is fine and not noisy, my voice sounds normal, I can open my mouth okay and there's no swelling in my neck — it's the pain and not being able to swallow that's the problem.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blisters, spots or rash on the hands, feet or buttocks — arguing against hand, foot and mouth disease as the cause of the mouth ulcers.
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any spots or blisters on your hands, feet or bottom?
Is there any rash anywhere other than around your mouth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No spots or blisters on my hands, feet or bottom — it really is only my mouth and lips.
